name: python3-rpds-py
title: python3-rpds-py
summary: Python bindings to Rust's persistent data structures (rpds)
description:
Python bindings to Rust's persistent data structures (rpds)
Python bindings to the Rust rpds crate for persistent data structures.
.
What's here is quite minimal (in transparency, it was written
initially to support replacing pyrsistent in the referencing
library). If you see something missing (which is very likely), a PR
is definitely welcome to add it.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-rpds-py because Python bindings to Rust's persistent data structures (rpds).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-rpds-py as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-rpds-py with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-rpds-py --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
